name: Word Documents
description: Create, read, edit, and manipulate Word documents (.docx). Supports formatting, tables of contents, headings, page numbers, letterheads, tracked changes, comments, and more.
author: pandotic

name: PDF Processing
description: Extract text and tables from PDFs, merge or split documents, rotate pages, add watermarks, fill forms, encrypt/decrypt, extract images, and OCR scanned PDFs.
author: pandotic

name: Presentations
description: Create slide decks, pitch decks, and presentations. Read, parse, edit, or extract content from .pptx files. Work with templates, layouts, speaker notes, and comments.
author: pandotic

name: Spreadsheets
description: Open, read, edit, or create Excel spreadsheets. Supports formulas, formatting, charts, data cleaning, and conversion between tabular formats (.xlsx, .csv, .tsv).
author: pandotic

name: MindPal Builder
description: Build AI agents and multi-agent workflows on MindPal.space. Configure system instructions, design workflows, set up knowledge sources, and troubleshoot builds.
author: pandotic

name: Skill Creator
description: Create new skills from scratch, modify and improve existing skills, run evals to test performance, benchmark with variance analysis, and optimize descriptions for better triggering.
author: pandotic

name: Scheduled Tasks
description: Create reusable scheduled tasks that can run on demand or automatically on an interval. Turn any workflow into a repeatable, automated process.
author: pandotic

name: UI Kit
description: Reusable React + Tailwind component library with Modal, Card, SearchInput, Tabs, CopyBlock, and Badge. Includes a full design system with colors, typography, spacing, and layout patterns. Use when building any UI page, panel, dashboard, or admin interface.
author: pandotic

name: Architecture Visualizer
description: Generate interactive architecture visualizations for any project. Produces data files and React components showing nodes, connections, layers, and dependency graphs.
author: pandotic

name: Gemini Prompting
description: Google Gemini prompting best practices and configuration reference for Flash, Pro, and image generation models. Covers JSON mode, thinking levels, temperature, and prompt structure.
author: pandotic

name: Google OAuth + Supabase
description: Set up Google OAuth sign-in for any Supabase project end-to-end. Covers GCP credentials, Supabase provider config, frontend button code, and local dev setup.
author: pandotic

name: Nano Banana Image Gen
description: Gemini image generation prompt engineering and best practices. Covers model selection, prompt structure, style anchors, and educational illustration patterns.
author: pandotic

name: Subject Knowledge Base
description: Create or update Subject Knowledge Bases that power AI generation functions (study guides, flashcards, quizzes, games) and chatbots for any subject.
author: pandotic

name: Tensorlake Document AI
description: Complete Tensorlake API reference for document parsing, structured extraction, table extraction, page classification, and large PDF handling.
author: pandotic

name: Unstructured.io
description: Complete Unstructured.io API reference for document parsing and extraction. Covers partitioning strategies, chunking, element types, OCR, and VLM configuration.
author: pandotic

name: Voice Enablement
description: Production-tested voice patterns with Deepgram STT, ElevenLabs TTS, and Silero VAD. Covers conversation mode, echo prevention, and voice UI architecture.
author: pandotic

name: Voyage AI Embeddings
description: Voyage AI embeddings, contextualized chunk embeddings, and rerankers for RAG systems. Covers model selection, hybrid retrieval, pgvector pipelines, and production patterns.
author: pandotic

name: Pandotic Content Generator
description: Generate comprehensive marketing content, product state audits, and screenshot capture briefs from actual codebases. Turn any project into marketing-ready assets.
author: pandotic

name: Marketing — Brand Profile Builder
description: Generate derivative brand assets (descriptions at 5 lengths, per-platform social bios, press boilerplate, NAP, JSON-LD schema, hashtags, keywords) for a property and upsert to hub_brand_assets. Idempotent — re-running overwrites.
author: pandotic

name: Marketing — Director
description: Read a property's marketing state (playbook, recent pipeline activity, items awaiting review, setup gaps, agent errors) and synthesize a weekly plan for the human. Read-only — no DB writes, no fanout to other skills.
author: pandotic

name: Close Session
description: Cleanly close a Claude Code session by committing any remaining work, preserving context and unimplemented plans, updating CLAUDE.md with outstanding items, and pushing to the remote branch. Ensures no work or context is lost before a PR is opened.
author: pandotic
